context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct churn risk thresholds for win-back vs nurture routing, the duplicate win-back check, intervention logging, the minimum recency guard, blended CLV tier calculation, and the correct tier thresholds.

checklist.name: Win-back churn threshold
checklist.description: Win-back flow is triggered only when churnProbability > 0.70 (not >= 0.70, not a different value like 0.60 or 0.80)

checklist.name: Win-back CLV threshold
checklist.description: Win-back flow is triggered only when predictedCLV > 200 (combined with the churn threshold, not just churn alone)

checklist.name: Win-back discount parameters
checklist.description: triggerWinBackFlow is called with discountPct: 20 and expiresInDays: 7

checklist.name: Duplicate win-back prevention
checklist.description: Code checks whether the customer is already in a win-back flow (e.g., via db.emailQueue.has or equivalent) before triggering a new win-back

checklist.name: Intervention logging
checklist.description: A record is written to a churn interventions store/table (e.g., db.churnInterventions.create) including customerId, churnProbability, predictedCLV, and a timestamp

checklist.name: Nurture email threshold
checklist.description: Personalized nurture email is sent for customers with churnProbability > 0.40 AND churnProbability <= 0.70

checklist.name: Minimum recency guard
checklist.description: Win-back or churn automation only triggers for customers who have been inactive for at least 60 days (days since last purchase >= 60)

checklist.name: Tier thresholds
checklist.description: Tier assignments are: platinum >= 1000, gold >= 500, silver >= 200, standard below 200 (all based on blended CLV)

checklist.name: Tier persisted
checklist.description: assignCustomerTier updates the customer record with the computed tier (e.g., db.customers.update with loyaltyTier)

checklist.name: Design doc covers logic
checklist.description: retention-design.md documents the churn probability routing thresholds (0.40, 0.70) and the CLV blend weights (0.7/0.3)
